name: Main Course Seafood Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fish stock or clam juice
3/4 pound Shrimp -- peeled and deveined, cut into thirds
3/4 pound Scallops -- foot removed and sliced horizontally
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring clam juice (or fish stock) and water to a bare simmer in a saucepan.
2. Heat olive oil in a wide saucepan and cook onions for 5 minutes or until lightly golden.
3. Add rice and stir, continuously stirring, for a couple of minutes to lightly toast it.
4. Add wine and cook gently until almost entirely evaporated.
5. Gradually add boiling water (and stock), about 1/2 cup at a time, and simmer the rice, stirring constantly, until all liquid is absorbed.
6. Repeat step 5, adding another 1/2 cup of liquid when the first portion has been absorbed.
7. When rice is halfway done (after about 15 minutes), cook seafood in a separate skillet with remaining olive oil.
8. Saute shrimp and scallops for about a minute or until almost fully cooked.
9. Transfer seafood to the rice and continue cooking until rice is tender (about 30-35 more minutes).
10. Add butter, season with salt and pepper, serve immediately, garnish with tomatoes and parsley.
Yield: 4 servings
